name: claude-${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}
initializeCommand: bash -c 'cd .devcontainer && { echo LOCAL_WORKSPACE_FOLDER_BASENAME=${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}; echo TZ=${localEnv:TZ:-UTC}; echo CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN=${localEnv:CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN}; echo HOST_GITCONFIG=${localEnv:USERPROFILE}${localEnv:HOME}/.gitconfig; } > .env'
postStartCommand: if [ "${CLAUDE_CODE_USE_FOUNDRY:-0}" = "1" ]; then az config set core.login_experience_v2=on >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi
